title: In Studio | Xponential
meta_description: Xponential Fitness is the largest fitness franchise group of boutique fitness brands across verticals including Pilates, Barre, Stretching, Boxing, and more.
body_markdown:
This website uses tracking technologies (collectively, “cookies”) to share your personal information with our affiliates, partners, and service providers to personalize your experience on our Online Services, including analyzing and tracking your activities on our websites, and to tailor advertising to your interests. Choosing to reject some or all cookies may impact your experience. Please see our [Privacy Policy](https://www.xponential.com/privacy-policy "Privacy Policy") for more information.

# In-Studio
##### Experience
[ Inquire to Franchise > ](https://www.xponential.com/franchising)
#### Premium Health & Wellness Studios
Our studios build a close-knit community where fitness and health goals are shared and celebrated. Our mission is to guide, inspire, challenge, and empower members to be the best version of themselves through workouts that build inner and outer strength.
![Y6-OCT-NEWPORT3051](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Y6-OCT-NEWPORT3051.jpg) ![Y6-OCT-NEWPORT3051](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Y6-OCT-NEWPORT3051.jpg)
#### Heart Pumping
Rock out with a heart-pumping, full-body ride at CycleBar or build strength and power at BFT's science-based group strength training. Find your endurance or find your inner fighter with Rumble boxing.
![bft](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/bft.svg)
![Guest-BFT](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/Guest-BFT.jpg) ![Man boxing to workout](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/heart-pumping-mobile.jpg)
#### Core Stability + Strength
Focus on your stability, strength, and balance with Club Pilates or target strength, flexibility, and cardio with Pure Barre’s effective, low-impact barre classes.
![club-pilates](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/club-pilates.svg)
![purebarre](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/purebarre.svg)
![XPO In Studio-2](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/XPO%20In%20Studio-2.png) ![XPO In Studio-2](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/XPO%20In%20Studio-2.png)
#### Rejuvenate + Recenter
Rediscover your mobility with assisted stretching at StretchLab, recenter metabolic health at Lindora, and strengthen, connect & transform with YogaSix.
![yogasix](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/yogasix.svg)
![stretchlab](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/cli-assets/images/in-studio/logos/stretchlab.svg)
![XPO In Studio-3](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/XPO%20In%20Studio-3.png) ![XPO In Studio-3](https://www.xponential.com/hubfs/XPO%20In%20Studio-3.png)
